title: VMware security advisory (AV26-186)
description: On February 27, 2026, VMware published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple Tanzu products.
products: VMware Tanzu Greenplum  versions prior to 7.7.1
VMware Tanzu Greenplum  versions prior to 6.32.1
VMware Tanzu Greenplum Upgrade  versions prior to 1.10.3
VMware Tanzu Greenplum Backup and Restore  versions prior to 1.32.4
VMware Tanzu RabbitMQ on Kubernetes  multiple versions
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
